conditions.name: Fire Tornados
conditions.description: Periodic fire tornadoes sweep the area, dealing fire damage.

conditions.name: Extreme Cold
conditions.description: Bitter cold reduces stamina regeneration and slows movement.

conditions.name: Toxic Haze
conditions.description: Toxic atmosphere slowly drains health without filtration.

conditions.name: Acid Storms
conditions.description: Periodic acid rain that damages unprotected Helldivers.

conditions.name: Blizzards
conditions.description: Severe blizzards reduce visibility and stamina.

conditions.name: Electrical Storms
conditions.description: Lightning strikes can shock Helldivers in the open.

conditions.name: Meteor Showers
conditions.description: Meteors rain from the sky, dealing explosive damage on impact.

conditions.name: Tremors
conditions.description: Ground tremors make footing unstable and hamper movement.

conditions.name: Extreme Heat
conditions.description: Intense heat reduces stamina regeneration and overheats energy weapons faster.

conditions.name: Dense Fog
conditions.description: Heavy fog severely reduces visibility range.

conditions.name: Rainstorm
conditions.description: Heavy rain reduces visibility and slows movement.

conditions.name: Sandstorm
conditions.description: Massive sandstorm obscures vision and fouls weapons.

conditions.name: Spore Clouds
conditions.description: Dense Terminid spore clouds slow stamina recovery and obscure movement.

conditions.name: Volcanic Activity
conditions.description: Sporadic lava bursts and heat waves erupt across the terrain.
conditions.debuff: Periodic fire damage, impassable lava flows

conditions.name: Ion Storms
conditions.description: Electromagnetic ion storms disrupt stratagem signals and increase cooldowns.

conditions.name: Stalker Infestation
conditions.description: High Stalker presence — invisible ambushers patrol the area.

conditions.name: Orbital Interference
conditions.description: Unusual gravity or atmospheric interference reduces orbital strike accuracy.

conditions.name: Permanent Fog
conditions.description: Constant thick fog blankets the area, severely reducing visibility at all times.

conditions.name: Gravity Anomalies
conditions.description: Localized gravity fluctuations affect movement and jump height unpredictably.

conditions.name: Intense Heat Lightning
conditions.description: Combined extreme heat and electrical storms. Both fire and shock hazards.

conditions.name: Volcanic Ash
conditions.description: Dense ash clouds reduce visibility and clog weapon mechanisms.
conditions.debuff: Reduced visibility, increased weapon jam rate

conditions.name: Solar Flare
conditions.description: Electromagnetic interference from solar activity increases stratagem cooldowns.

conditions.name: Toxic Spores
conditions.description: Terminid-specific toxic spores that actively damage health over time.

conditions.name: Null Zone
conditions.description: Illuminate energy suppression field reduces ability effectiveness.
conditions.debuff: Reduced ability effectiveness, slower shield regen

conditions.name: Magnetic Anomaly
conditions.description: Intense magnetic fields cause compasses to malfunction and disrupt radar.

conditions.name: Acid Rain
conditions.description: Continuous acid rain deals persistent damage to exposed Helldivers.
conditions.debuff: Constant acid damage outdoors, armor degradation
